rationale: Rev 2 is implementation-ready and consistent with the normative invariant, two-blade gate, fail-closed full-40-hex Evidence Ledger, and real no-WebGL/reduced-motion DOM a11y layer. WebGL-is-paint is structural (XState + typed closed command registry as sole truth; every interaction a semantic HTML control; canvas pointer-events none; ?e2e=1 freezes RNG/physics). Functional blade is deterministic and closed (inventory==coverage, pinned Playwright/Chromium, numeric LCP/CLS/TBT budgets). Aesthetic blade correctly left to The Eye with no fake oracle. Product-target deps (including Playwright) respect the zero-dep-core trust model. Non-goals and acceptance sequence are scope-honest. No hard stops remain after the folded round-1 objections; Argo may BUILD to this plan.
